div1.entryFree:
Childhood, 1) the time in which men are children: Mids. IV, 1, 173. Rom. III, 3, 95 (the c. of our joy). Mcb. II, 2, 54 ('tis the eye of c. that fears a painted devil). in their --s, Wint. I, 1, 25. c. innocence, Mids. III, 2, 202. c. proof, Merch. I, 1, 144.
2) the relation to parents: thou better knowest the offices of nature, bond of c., Lr. II, 4, 181.
